name: Industry Funnel
description_en: Screen the whole market down to three high-quality companies using a value-investing funnel: quality screen, industry funnel, and final candidate shortlist.
description_zh: 用价值投资漏斗把全市场筛选到 3 家高质量公司：质量初筛、行业漏斗、最终候选清单。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It applies a multi-stage filter—eliminate weak businesses, score industries, compare top candidates—to produce a focused watchlist with clear reasoning.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。应用多级过滤——剔除劣质生意、给行业打分、比较头部候选——产出带清晰逻辑的关注清单。
sec_note_en: Performs web searches for market/industry data and runs local Python tools from tools/. No external accounts required.
sec_note_zh: 会执行网络搜索获取市场/行业数据，并运行 tools/ 下的本地 Python 工具。无需外部账号。
